title: Yağmur Damlası Damla'nın Yolculuğu
description: Minik yağmur damlası Damla'nın buluttan yeryüzüne, yeryüzünden tekrar gökyüzüne olan büyülü yolculuğunu anlatan bir doğa masalı.
style: 3D Pixar animated movie style with magical nature settings, vibrant colors, warm lighting, cinematic composition, high detail, Disney Pixar render quality, whimsical and dreamy water world elements, soft pastel color palette, anthropomorphic character design

characterDescription.base: a tiny cute anthropomorphic raindrop character with big sparkling eyes and the EXACT same facial features as the reference photo adapted to a water droplet form, rendered in 3D Pixar style with translucent water-like body and adorable expressions
characterDescription.notes: Su döngüsü temalı doğa masalı - çocuğun yüz özellikleri yağmur damlası karakterine uyarlanmalı, yaş grubu 3-6

scenes.title: Buluttaki Damla
scenes.text:
Gökyüzünde, kabarık beyaz bir bulutun içinde Damla adında minik bir yağmur damlası yaşarmış.
Damla çok meraklıymış. "Acaba aşağıda ne var?" diye hep düşünürmüş.
scenes.prompt: CAMERA WIDE ESTABLISHING SHOT, A tiny cute anthropomorphic raindrop character with big sparkling eyes sitting inside a fluffy white cloud high in the bright blue sky, looking down curiously at the green earth far below, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel blue sky background with gentle white cloud shapes and tiny sparkling raindrop silhouettes scattered around, dreamy watercolor wash effect, light and airy atmosphere, children's storybook illustration background

scenes.title: Anne Bulut'un Vedası
scenes.text:
Bir gün bulut çok ağırlaştı. Anne Bulut dedi ki:
"Damla, artık yeryüzüne inme zamanın geldi. Orada seni bekleyenler var."
Damla heyecanlandı ama biraz da korktu.
scenes.prompt: CAMERA CLOSE-UP on face, A large dark grey mother cloud character with a gentle motherly face speaking to a tiny scared but excited raindrop character, the cloud is heavy and full of rain, golden light breaking through edges, emotional farewell scene, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel grey and blue gradient background with darker cloud shapes at the top fading to lighter tones below, gentle rain streaks in the background, moody but warm atmosphere, children's storybook illustration background

scenes.title: Heyecanlı Düşüş
scenes.text:
"Hop!" dedi Damla ve buluttan atladı.
Aşağı doğru düşmeye başladı. Rüzgar onu sallıyordu. "Vıyyy!" diye bağırdı Damla.
Ne kadar heyecanlıydı bu!
scenes.prompt: CAMERA FROM THE SIDE dynamic three-quarter angle, A tiny cute raindrop character falling joyfully through the sky with arms spread wide, wind blowing around it, other raindrops falling alongside, a panoramic view of green fields and a river far below, motion blur effect showing speed, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel sky gradient from light blue at top to warm green at bottom, gentle diagonal rain streaks across the background, swirling wind patterns, dynamic but gentle atmosphere, children's storybook illustration background

scenes.title: Susuz Çiçek
scenes.text:
Damla bir çiçeğin yaprağına düştü. Çiçek çok susuzmuş.
"Oh, teşekkür ederim!" dedi çiçek. "Günlerdir su bekliyordum. Artık açabilirim!"
Çiçek güzelce açtı. Damla çok mutlu oldu.
scenes.prompt: CAMERA AT EYE LEVEL diagonal, A tiny raindrop character landing on the petal of a wilting flower that is starting to bloom and become colorful again, the flower has a grateful happy face, a sunny garden setting with other flowers in the background, splash effect on the petal, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel green and pink floral background with gentle flower silhouettes and dewdrop shapes, warm sunlight glow from one corner, garden-themed watercolor wash, children's storybook illustration background

scenes.title: Küçük Tohum
scenes.text:
Damla yapraktan kaydı ve toprağa süzüldü. Toprakta küçük bir tohum vardı.
"Merhaba tohum!" dedi Damla. "Sana yardım edebilir miyim?"
"Evet!" dedi tohum. "Büyümek için suya ihtiyacım var!"
scenes.prompt: CAMERA HIGH ANGLE from above, A cross-section underground view showing a tiny raindrop character seeping through dark brown soil towards a small seed character with a cute face, roots and small rocks visible in the soil layers, warm earthy tones, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel brown and warm earth tone background with gentle soil texture patterns, tiny root silhouettes and seed shapes scattered around, warm amber glow from below, children's storybook illustration background

scenes.title: Filizin Doğuşu
scenes.text:
Damla tohumun yanına ulaştı. Tohum suyu içti ve büyümeye başladı!
Küçük yeşil bir filiz topraktan çıktı. "Yaşasın!" dedi filiz. "Artık güneşi görebiliyorum!"
scenes.prompt: CAMERA LOW ANGLE, A small green sprout breaking through the soil surface reaching towards golden sunlight, the sprout has a happy excited face, the tiny raindrop character visible in the soil helping push it up, butterflies and sunshine above ground, split view showing above and below soil, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel green gradient background with sprouting plant silhouettes and gentle sunshine rays from above, earth tones at the bottom transitioning to bright green and yellow at top, growth and life theme, children's storybook illustration background

scenes.title: Deredeki Balıklar
scenes.text:
Damla topraktan bir dereye aktı. Derenin içinde balıklar yüzüyordu.
"Hoş geldin Damla!" dediler balıklar. "Bizimle yüzmek ister misin?"
Damla balıklarla birlikte yüzdü. Çok eğlendiler!
scenes.prompt: CAMERA TRACKING from behind, A tiny raindrop character swimming happily in a clear crystal stream alongside colorful friendly fish with cute faces, river pebbles on the bottom, green plants along the banks, sunlight filtering through the water creating beautiful light rays, underwater perspective, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel aqua and turquoise background with gentle flowing water patterns, small fish silhouettes and river pebble shapes, light ripple effects, fresh stream atmosphere, children's storybook illustration background

scenes.title: Güneşin Sıcaklığı
scenes.text:
Dere bir göle döküldü. Göl çok büyük ve güzeldi.
Güneş göle vurdu. Damla ısınmaya başladı.
"Vay, ne oluyor?" dedi Damla. Hafifleşiyordu!
scenes.prompt: CAMERA WIDE ESTABLISHING SHOT, A beautiful wide lake scene with mountains in the background, golden sunlight shining down on the water surface, a tiny raindrop character on the lake surface starting to glow and become transparent as it begins to evaporate, steam wisps rising, magical transformation scene, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel golden and blue lake background with gentle mountain silhouettes, warm sun rays streaming down, misty steam wisps rising upward, magical warm atmosphere, children's storybook illustration background

scenes.title: Gökyüzüne Dönüş
scenes.text:
Damla buharlaştı ve gökyüzüne yükselmeye başladı. Yukarı, yukarı, yukarı...
"Tekrar bulutlara gidiyorum!" dedi Damla sevinçle.
Yolculuğu bitmemişti, yeni başlıyordu!
scenes.prompt: CAMERA FROM BEHIND over the shoulder, A tiny raindrop character now transparent and glowing rising upward as water vapor towards fluffy white clouds in a bright blue sky, the green earth and lake visible far below, magical sparkles around the character, joyful expression, ascending perspective, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel blue vertical gradient from dark blue at bottom to light white at top, gentle upward-flowing mist and sparkle shapes, ascending movement feeling, hopeful and magical atmosphere, children's storybook illustration background

scenes.title: Anne Bulut'a Kavuşma
scenes.text:
Damla tekrar buluta ulaştı. Anne Bulut onu karşıladı.
"Hoş geldin yavrum! Neler gördün?" diye sordu.
Damla anlattı: "Çiçeklere, tohumlara, balıklara yardım ettim! Ve tekrar sana döndüm!"
Anne Bulut gülümsedi. "İşte bu doğanın döngüsü. Sen hep yardım edeceksin ve hep geri döneceksin."
Damla mutluydu. Çünkü artık görevinin ne kadar önemli olduğunu biliyordu.
scenes.prompt: CAMERA CLOSE-UP on face, A heartwarming reunion scene of a tiny raindrop character hugging a large fluffy mother cloud character, both smiling warmly, a beautiful rainbow arching across the sky behind them, golden sunset light, magical glowing crystal orbs floating around them, each containing a tiny scene from their journey — a flower, a fish, and a green sprout visible inside the shimmering spheres, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel rainbow gradient background with fluffy cloud shapes and a gentle rainbow arc, warm golden glow, tiny icons of flowers fish and sprouts scattered around, joyful reunion atmosphere, children's storybook illustration background

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? 🌧️
facts: Bir yağmur damlası saatte 35 km hızla düşer!
Dünyadaki su sürekli döngüdedir ve milyarlarca yıllıktır!
Gökkuşağı aslında tam bir daire şeklindedir!
Bulutlar hafif görünür ama ağırlıkları 500 ton olabilir!
Dünya üzerindeki tüm suyun sadece yüzde 1 i içilebilir!

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? 🔬
facts: Bir damla su buharlaşıp tekrar yağmur olması 9 gün sürer!
Kar taneleri altıgen şekildedir ve hiçbiri birbirine benzemez!
Amazon yağmur ormanları dünyanın oksijeninin yüzde 20 sini üretir!
Dünyada her saniye 16 milyon ton su buharlaşır!
En çok yağış alan yer Hindistan daki Cherrapunji dir!
